Multi-Region Cloud Deployment Plan

Custom Composition · plan-html

Interactive Config State JSON

Deployment Sync Status

US East (N. Virginia) - us-east-1 100%
100%
Europe (Ireland) - eu-west-1 80%
80%
Asia Pacific (Singapore) - ap-southeast-1 40%
40%

Compliance & Security Policies

Network Access Controls (NACLs)

Rule 100: Deny all ingress from untrusted networks.

Rule 110: Allow HTTPS (port 443) from application load balancers only.

Identity & Access Management (IAM)

Roles are region-scoped and leverage service control policies (SCPs) to enforce MFA access constraints globally.

User Notes & Feedback

These notes sync to the JSON state and copy block.
